◎简　　介  

　　arbara Stanwyck (in her last theatrical feature) stars with a wealthy woman who's terrorized by recurring dreams regarding her jealous, blind husband who supposedly burned to death in a recent fire. She tries to convince her attorney played by Robert Taylor (the real-life ex-husband of Stanwyck) that the nightmares are real. Exploitation king William Castle produced and directe...
